== 2. g4?? ==
This move blunders a pawn for no apparent reason, while severely weakening the kingside. Black can play [[/2...e5|2...e5!]], threatening checkmate and therefore winning a pawn. Or Black could just take the pawn with 2...Bxg4.

'''1.f4 d5 2.g4??'''
